name: Madison Technologies Inc.
business: Madison Technologies Inc. is seeking to create, develop and launch BlockchainTV (BCTV), a first-to-market 24/7 television broadcast and streaming communications network designed to bring cryptocurrency information and entertainment to viewers. Core revenue streams would be generated by selling advertising and sponsorships, supplemented by e-commerce.

exposures.sentence: Madison Technologies Inc. is seeking to create, develop and launch BlockchainTV (BCTV), the first-to-market 24/7 television broadcast and streaming communications network designed to bring the most up-to-date cryptocurrency information and entertainment to the masses in the U.S. and around the world.
